modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in bullet points and use a short and minimal tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be no spelling errors and some irrelevant details included.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Outlook preview pane format changes unexpectedly while using calendar.

full_description_text:
- The preview pane in Outlook keeps changing formats randomly.  
- This happens every time I click in or out of the calendar section.  
- It’s frustrating because I have multiple email accounts and it disrupts my workflow.
short_description: Outlook preview pane format changes unexpectedly while using calendar.
description:
